bg.value: Create recurring access models for materials
Motivate students with levels, badges and rewards.
Send order notifications to external systems
Connect external models and knowledge bases via MCP protocol
Integrations with CRM, Mailing, and other systems
Integration with MailerLite, ActiveCampaign and Zapier is being implemented.
You can already save keys in the Webhooks section for testing.
Direct communication with the browser agent
Symulowana odpowiedź modelu {model}. Otrzymałem: "{content}". W pełnej wersji tutaj nastąpiłoby połączenie z API (np. OpenAI, Manus) lub bazą danych.
